programme.title: When You Just Can't Win

programme.title: Look Forward Not Far
programme.desc: We all go through times when we’re looking ahead, and our future looks uncertain. We want clarity, but instead, God gives us the courage to move forward in faith. It’s in these moments we learn not to be driven by what’s easy but to be pulled forward by purpose.

programme.title: New Number Same Name
programme.desc: If you’re looking at what’s next and feeling nervous, remember this: What God has done in your life is only the foundation, not the finish line. He’s a creative God, still at work in ways you’re not expecting. Let go of your plan so God can show you His purpose.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don’t be so confused about the noise around you that you can’t hear the God who made you. When you’re faced with a struggle you didn’t see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: Move It To The Middle
programme.desc: Stressed, insecure, and stuck — that’s how Moses felt, too. But that wasn’t the end of his story, and it’s not yours, either. It’s just the middle. There’s hope past this chapter, and it’s found by shifting your focus back to God.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is in for an adrenaline-packed adventure in Croatia as he targets the elusive Kri Kri Ibex and Mouflon. programme.title: Airtime Ep32: The Titans of Windsurfing - Maui, Hawaii
programme.desc: Big-wave windsurfing history catches up with the present as European Champion Tristan Boxford takes us inside the progression of the sport. On Maui, Hawaii, meet the legends; hear how it all started and where it's going. Hang out with pioneers like Robby Naish, Jason Polakow, the Angulo brothers, as well as windsurfing's present rulers Levi Siver, Kauli Seadi and Daida Moreno. From board-shaping to riding big waves at Jaws and Hookipa, learn about the birthplace of a sport.

programme.title: Honor Of The Range - 1934
programme.desc: A singing cowboy rides into a troubled frontier community where corruption and deception threaten honest ranchers. As he uncovers a scheme involving land and cattle, he uses both his charm and courage to expose the villains and restore justice on the range.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Trouble Busters

programme.title: The Cowboy and the Bandit
programme.desc: Bill travels to a new state after the outlaw Scarface saves him from a lynch mob. There he takes a job on the Barton ranch and joins in the fight against gang leader Larkin. Finding a wounded Scarface he helps him recover. Arrested by Larkin's stooge Sheriff, and with another lynch mob after him, he once again needs Scarface's help.

programme.title: The Gambling Terror 1937
programme.desc: In The Gambling Terror, cowboy hero Johnny Mack Brown takes on a ruthless gang that’s bleeding a frontier town dry with crooked gambling and brutal intimidation. Standing tall against the odds, he fights to bring law and order back to the West. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes tension, and a dash of frontier romance, this thrilling Western proves that justice always calls the final hand.
